Taxonomy decided and recorded in --design: runtime Target (effects.py) is the single source of truth; authoring 'player'->'chooser', self->self, all->all, center=placement-only. Chooser plumbing bug filed as aiu (DONE). Alias-mapping impl filed as 4eh. Card-targeting spike filed as cbj. Human-confirmation note left in history; decision is sound and reversible. Deliverable (decided taxonomy + follow-ups) complete.

Design decided and recorded in --design: CardTarget is a separate axis from player Target (literals this/chosen_card/all_in_play/all_in_hand), needs ctx.chosen_card_id + _resolve_card_targets, and a 'card zones' model as prerequisite. Implementation deferred to follow-ups (spawned below). Human-confirmation note in history. Deliverable (design outcome) complete.

Downloaded all 700 curated album images into data/eval/images/ (gitignored); committed scraper (download_images.py) + tracked image_urls.json + manifest.json. Dependency on 75j bypassed: real i.imgur.com links came straight from the album's embedded postDataJSON, so no transcription/link-fix was needed to download. No API key or Playwright required.

Transcribed all 700 album photos via vision (28 batches x 25) into data/eval/real_cards.json with real Imgur URLs. Renamed 35-card gold set to eval_cards.json, stripped fake fallback image_urls. Repointed harness/tests/docs. 506 tests pass.

Superseded by 89z: real image URLs sourced from album postDataJSON (data/eval/image_urls.json, no IMGUR_CLIENT_ID needed) and full album transcribed by vision into real_cards.json (700 cards). Fake fallback URLs removed from the gold set (now eval_cards.json).

Annotated all 698 real_cards human_canonical via 28 subagent batches per CANONICAL_SPEC.md. Applied player-over-self rule (523 player / 101 self), richer targets (card/all_cards/none), placement vocab, and NEW venue axis (546 all / 152 in_person). Added venue to CardCanonical, validator, tests. 508 tests pass, 0 validation errors.

Merged. NOTE: on Python 3.14 (PEP 758) 'except A, B:' is VALID syntax — the SyntaxError diagnosis was wrong; child runner worked all along. Hardening + validator forbidden-calls + round-trip tests landed anyway. Chess-card root cause is solely the unwired snippet path (bead bsv).

docs/self-modification-spike.md: do NOT build runtime source self-modification. Path: (1) agent 'wish' tool → beads telemetry now; (2) generic interaction_request/response envelopes + one data-driven InteractionPanel after registry phases A-E; (3) agent-authored PRs gated by CI+human only if telemetry demands. Do-not-build list: in-process hot-reload, per-room forked engines, code-loading plugin ABI, frontend code execution, anything bypassing revalidate.py.
Merged; agent died at spend limit mid-test-writing, work salvaged/finished in main loop. Cumulative totals in RAG payload, retirement, epilogue persistence all landed with tests.

All confirmed findings fixed across two branches (6mt-runtime merged earlier, 6mt-engine now): snippet choice-target rejection + belt, first_to degenerate-threshold guard, phase gate + flag clearing, verdict gate, EndGameOp.winner (You-win cards crown the player), forced-call system prompt + non-blocking timeout, new tests (store round-trip, unequal scores, sanitization), comment cleanup. 933 tests green.

All six children closed: phases A-E (rules-as-data, open targets/conditions/attributes/create-card, hooks-as-data + per-room events, full-width facade + play-veto, agent/RAG round-trip) plus the self-modification spike (docs/self-modification-spike.md: descriptors, not source edits). The Uno ladder works at every tier: rule ops → created colored cards → color-match validation hook. 972 tests green.

Dynamic snapshots and frontend now expose turn order, rules, conditions, attributes, hooks, and durable resolution diagnostics; preview uses cloned real execution without persistent write tools; bounded wish telemetry replaces runtime source/issue edits.

Merged: vertical newest-at-top play log, max-h 180px scroll, wrap not truncate, arbiter comments ink-panel cream text w/ marker-red border, brewing at top, popin on new entry; vitest coverage added.

Merged: _auto_draw at turn start (extracted from _handle_draw), first-player covered via _start_playing->_start_turn, deck-exhaustion latch preserved, DrawMsg removed from protocol + docs, Draw button/prompt removed, 12 test files updated + new pins. Full suite 1363 passed.

Merged: night-table dark palette (near-black warm paper, deep-green felt, cream ink, tuned accents/identity colors), card faces stay paper-white via --card-face + paper-scope, ThemeToggle w/ pre-paint script + localStorage + prefers-color-scheme fallback, players.ts theme-aware var() colors, docs/design updated, 2 new vitest.

Merged: DiscardPile component always renders slot; dashed ghost 80x112 matching SketchCard footprint at 0 cards, unchanged top-card+count otherwise; single clickable root ready for av5 modal; 4 vitest.

Merged: Room._resolving_play freeze (try/finally, checked before lock wait) rejects play/pass/end_turn/create_card/start mid-brew; reactions exempt (window opens post-resolution); hand non-selectable + End Turn hidden while brewing; 15 backend + 4 frontend tests.

Merged: _start_playing shuffles turn_order (injectable rng, finalize_deck idiom) AND aligns turn_index to turn_order[0] since active_player() reads players[turn_index]; advance_turn verified to follow effective_turn_order; seeded + permutation tests, 3 order-assuming tests made order-agnostic.

Merged: GameState.turn_number (persists via model_dump/FileRoomStore automatically), set to 1 at setup->playing, incremented in advance_turn only on genuinely new active player (extra-turn pinned unchanged), Turn N font-hand in top bar during playing.

Merged: create_card+preview_card gated to setup phase (gate above pending checks), ~80-line mid-game LLM interpretation branch deleted, blank author-on-play untouched (existing tests), Author-a-card button + page-level dialog removed, protocol docs updated. Full suite 1372 passed.

Merged: panel below EffectLog, isDevMode() gate (NEXT_PUBLIC_DEV_MODE/NODE_ENV), color mystery = active-turn bg swap mistaken for per-client palette; now shared lib/players.ts identity chips + border-based active marker + theme tokens; 4 new vitest.

Merged: Everything Played scrim modal from discard tap (52x73 SketchCards, by/target/turn, newest-first, reads history_events not discard list so all zones included); with_history_event stamps turn + real resolved target; 8 new frontend tests + 2 backend.

Merged: Table/Gallery/Scores nav tabs (playing phase), gallery = alphabetical 164x230 SketchCard grid w/ hover-straighten + creator attribution + 60-batch Show more, scoreboard = live identity-color rows w/ hand/in-play counts, overlays close on tab/Escape/scrim, live gameState re-render; 16 new vitest.

Merged: @dnd-kit/core 6.3.1, DraggableHandCard gated identically to selectable, felt drop = Play-button path, seat drop sends chosen_player_id (carried end-to-end in PlayMsg; server skips prompt_choice), blank drop opens PlayBlankDialog w/ pending target, MouseSensor+TouchSensor so click+scroll preserved, identity-color drop affordances; 61 vitest in worktree.

Fixed: ws.ts clears brewing on state (reconnect deadlock); _resolving_play now wraps reaction resolve path (stale-queue race); 3 stale architecture.md lines corrected. Tests: 2 reaction-freeze + brewing hook lifecycle. 1376 backend + 78 frontend pass.

Merged: Gallery shows only public cards (new lib/public-cards.ts: in_play+discard+house_rules, +deck only in setup); history 'Everyone' only when audience=all players else names; resolvePlayerName reused; OverlayShell + StandingRow extracted (gallery/scoreboard/results); tests semantic (data-arbiter/data-active) not class-name; turn_order test asserts contract; page.tsx grays->tokens + dead shim removed; FileRoomStore backfills legacy turn_number>=1; has_drawn comment honest; vision retry narrowed to image-rejection errors. 1378 backend + 84 frontend pass.
